name: @intentsolutionsio/market-sentiment-analyzer
description: Analyze market sentiment from social media, news, and on-chain data

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install market-sentiment-analyzer\\n  or /plugin install market-sentiment-analyzer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
